paragraphs.text:
I found the **zinc–L-histidine** equilibrium dataset in SRD-46, but **no citation from about 2005 appears in this Zn–histidine record set**. The citations attached to these measurements run from older literature up to **1999**, with the most recent hit being:

| Shortcut | Citation |
|---|---|
| 99AA | Z. M. Anwar and H. A. Azab, *J. Chem. Eng. Data*, **1999**, *44*, 1151 |

So, based on the SRD-46 Zn–histidine entry, the nearest available “modern” citation is **Anwar & Azab (1999)** rather than a 2005 paper.

paragraphs.text:
### Constants reported for Zn(II)–L-histidine in SRD-46
Below are the stability constants present in the database for the Zn–histidine system. I’ve kept them grouped by experimental conditions because SRD-46 stores multiple literature sets.

| Species / reaction | β definition | logK | T (°C) | I (M) |
|---|---|---:|---:|---:|
| Zn + L ⇌ ZnL | ML (`beta_def_812`) | 6.51 | 25 | 0.1 |
| Zn + 2L ⇌ ZnL2 | ML2 (`beta_def_840`) | 12.04 | 25 | 0.1 |
| ZnL + H ⇌ ZnHL | MHL (`beta_def_788`) | 4.86 | 25 | 0.1 |
| ZnL2 + H ⇌ ZnHL2 | MHL2 (`beta_def_792`) | 5.80 | 25 | 0.1 |
| ZnHL2 + H ⇌ Zn(HL)2 | M(HL)2 (`beta_def_204`) | 5.67 | 25 | 0.1 |

| Species / reaction | β definition | logK | T (°C) | I (M) |
|---|---|---:|---:|---:|
| Zn + L ⇌ ZnL | ML (`beta_def_812`) | 6.48 | 25 | 0.5 |
| Zn + 2L ⇌ ZnL2 | ML2 (`beta_def_840`) | 11.91 | 25 | 0.5 |
| Zn(OH)L2 + H ⇌ ZnL2 + H2O | hydroxo relation (`beta_def_984`) | 9.95 | 25 | 0.5 |

| Species / reaction | β definition | logK | T (°C) | I (M) |
|---|---|---:|---:|---:|
| Zn + L ⇌ ZnL | ML (`beta_def_812`) | 6.58 | 25 | 1.0 |
| Zn + 2L ⇌ ZnL2 | ML2 (`beta_def_840`) | 12.29 | 25 | 1.0 |

| Species / reaction | β definition | logK | T (°C) | I (M) |
|---|---|---:|---:|---:|
| Zn + L ⇌ ZnL | ML (`beta_def_812`) | 7.07 | 25 | 3.0 |
| Zn + 2L ⇌ ZnL2 | ML2 (`beta_def_840`) | 12.74 | 25 | 3.0 |

| Species / reaction | β definition | logK | T (°C) | I (M) |
|---|---|---:|---:|---:|
| Zn + L ⇌ ZnL | ML (`beta_def_812`) | 6.35 | 37 | 0.15 |
| Zn + 2L ⇌ ZnL2 | ML2 (`beta_def_840`) | 11.67 | 37 | 0.15 |
| ZnL + H ⇌ ZnHL | MHL (`beta_def_788`) | 4.61 | 37 | 0.15 |
| ZnL2 + H ⇌ ZnHL2 | MHL2 (`beta_def_792`) | 5.50 | 37 | 0.15 |

SRD-46 also includes some thermodynamic entries for this system:

| Reaction | Quantity | Value | T (°C) | I (M) |
|---|---|---:|---:|---:|
| Zn + L ⇌ ZnL | ΔH | -20.1 | 25 | 0.1 |
| Zn + L ⇌ ZnL | ΔS | 57.3 | 25 | 0.1 |
| ZnL + H ⇌ ZnHL | ΔH | -27.6 | 25 | 0.1 |
| ZnL + H ⇌ ZnHL | ΔS | 0.4 | 25 | 0.1 |
| Zn + 2L ⇌ ZnL2 | ΔH | 0.0 | 25 | 0.1 |
| Zn + 2L ⇌ ZnL2 | ΔH | -47.3 | 25 | 0.1 |
| Zn + 2L ⇌ ZnL2 | ΔS | 72.0 | 25 | 0.1 |
| Zn + 2L ⇌ ZnL2 | ΔS | -67.4 | 25 | 0.1 |
| Zn + L ⇌ ZnL | ΔH | -23.0 | 25 | 3.0 |
| Zn + 2L ⇌ ZnL2 | ΔH | -49.4 | 25 | 3.0 |
| Zn + 2L ⇌ ZnL2 | ΔS | 58.2 | 25 | 3.0 |

paragraphs.text:
### Bottom line
| Finding | Result |
|---|---|
| 2005 Zn–histidine citation in SRD-46 | **Not found** |
| Most recent citation attached to this Zn–histidine dataset | **Anwar & Azab, 1999, J. Chem. Eng. Data, 44, 1151** |
| Main reported Zn–His species | **ZnL, ZnL2, ZnHL, ZnHL2, Zn(HL)2, and a hydroxo relation Zn(OH)L2** |

If you want, I can next **dig specifically into the 1999 citation** and separate **exactly which of these constants SRD-46 attributes to that paper** rather than listing the whole Zn–histidine dataset.  
*Source: NIST SRD-46.*
